name: Amamiya Mirei
title: Oni Kuroha

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Type 1: One-Winged
basic.description: Mirei demonstrates her swordsmanship, combining precise and continuous movements.

core.name: Sword Technique Type 2: Dance of the Raven
core.description: Mirei performs a deadly sword technique with quick and elegant movements.

skill.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Type 3: Wings of Night
skill.description: Mirei quickly approaches, performs a series of slashes, then distances herself from the enemy. Lastly, she delivers a deep slashing attack with eerie calm.

skill.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Type 4: Raven's Cry
skill.description: Mirei soars through the air as fast as lightning and delivers a powerful final blow.

support.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Type 6: Storm Raven
support.description: Mirei appears with movements as fluid as a shadow and delivers a powerful final blow.

qte.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Type 5: Shadow Waltz
qte.description: Mirei strikes by rotating her katana in a rapid, storm-like spiral.

ultimate.name: Kuroha's Sword Technique Lethal Move: Moonless Night Overture
ultimate.description: Oni Kuroha's soul takes over, completely turning the tide of battle. Applies [Possessed] effect, resets skill cooldowns, removes all debuffs from team members.

passive.name: Kuroha's Darkness
passive.description: When the user has 30% or more of their maximum MP, applies [Kuroha's Darkness] effect. Increases Attack by 6% for every additional 150 MP (up to 90%). [Kuroha's Darkness]: Increases damage of Wings of Night and Raven's Cry by 30%.

advancements: Moonless Night Overture applies [Winter's Edge] on target (100% ATK every 3s, 30s, stacks x10). While [Possessed]: +20% Critical Hit Damage. Using Wings of Night while [Possessed] applies [Deep Darkness] (+12% ATK and Crit Rate, stacks x2, 10s).
On stage entry, Power Gauge charges by 40% and Critical Hit Damage increases by 40%.

Basic Attack or Core Attack restores 2% MP and 1% Power Gauge, reduces Moonless Night Overture cooldown by 2s. Attacking a [Winter's Edge] target grants [Midnight Gale] (Defense Penetration +0.2%, Wind Overload damage +1%, infinite, stacks x100).
Increases Wind damage by 12% for every Wind team member in the party (stacks up to 3 times).
While [Possessed], grants [Raven's Confession]: Wings of Night and Raven's Cry damage +80%, back attack damage +30%.
